_comment: Set `orcid` to your ORCID iD. The weekly workflow pulls works from your ORCID record and enriches each DOI from Crossref; nothing else needs to be authored here. Edit `selected` to pick papers and order; match papers by DOI. Use `overrides` to add project-page / code / slides links to any paper. `extras` are papers ORCID/Crossref don't have yet; add them here and they render alongside the auto-fetched list. `exclude_dois` hides specific papers (e.g. a preprint superseded by a published version). Changes to `selected`, `overrides`, `extras`, and `exclude_dois` take effect on next page load; no workflow re-run needed.
